textByHashes.144bf996623f5a16e3d95be02c5a1b2a9732b964: Alliance? We plan to crush the hairy little men as soon as the humans are gone!
textByHashes.6544e07c3c46a652a9996bb08ff55d909188ec38: Ah, this food thinks it's a brave one, this will be fun!
textByHashes.c4afed776105fbb4cf49d7df01043b457df2600d: Here's the game, I kill you, we help little hairy men kill all the humans. You kill me, we call off the attack.
textByHashes.7b0eaa45701e1a6150eab598610ff2b0b5512c0f: Maybe human not as brave as Kob thinks!
textByHashes.2e54bf6f6f176113fe882adfbab8841637824b86: Humans are all so weak! There is nothing you can offer us to stop the attack!
textByHashes.f122da26720974e5ebf14bef5294351096915d21: I am Kob, mightiest of the troll generals!
textByHashes.1e990aee91b4ef8fdf2ebe68b00c41349a3059b3: Wait! Maybe battle to death is too much...
textByHashes.957e602a0f1503cb8928127d68987516e15240a3: You win, I will call off the attack.
